name: tencentcloud-sdk-python-ic

metadata.name: tencentcloud-sdk-python-ic
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License
metadata.summary: Tencent Cloud Ic SDK for Python

documentation:
# Tencent Cloud SDK for Python

Tencent Cloud Python Ic SDK is the official software development kit, which allows Python developers to write software that makes use of Tencent Cloud services like CVM and CBS.
The SDK works on Python versions:

> - 2.7 and greater, including 3.x

## Quick Start

First, install the library:

```sh
$ pip install tencentcloud-sdk-python-common
$ pip install tencentcloud-sdk-python-ic
```

or download source code from github and install:

```sh
$ git clone https://github.com/tencentcloud/tencentcloud-sdk-python.git
$ cd tencentcloud-sdk-python
$ python package.py --components common ic
```

methods.name: tencentcloud.ic.v20190307.ic_client.IcClient.RenewCards
documentation:
批量为卡片续费，此接口建议调用至少间隔10s,如果出现返回deal lock failed相关的错误，请过10s再重试。
续费的必要条件：
1、单次续费的卡片不可以超过 100张。
2、接口只支持在控制台购买的卡片进行续费
3、销户和未激活的卡片不支持续费。
4、每张物联网卡，续费总周期不能超过24个月

```
param request

Request instance for RenewCards.

type request



rtype

```
